Ohio Senate passes Constitutional amendment on voter photo ID; moves to House.

link_metadata.title: Ohio Senate passes Constitutional amendment on voter photo ID; moves to House

Ohio Senate passes Constitutional amendment on voter photo ID; moves to House.
